headline: Norton Introduces Revamp: The AI-Powered Way to Build Your Online Presence
summary: Today, reputation lives online. But staying consistently present can be difficult. Profiles become outdated, posting falls off, and generic AI-generated content can make people, especially professionals, sound less credible. To help people build a consistent and trustworthy voice online, Norton, a leader in Cyber Safety and part of Gen (NASDAQ: GEN), today launched Norton Revamp. This new AI-powered online presence builder provides strategic direction, built-in writing support and guided pacing
